OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Determines the benefit amount that an applicant is eligible for based on applicant data stored in business process objects.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: Determine Eligible Benefit Amount

omniProcessElements.name: CalculateBenefitAmount
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "GetParentIA:ParentApplicationId == NULL", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "ExpressionSetAction1", "remoteClass" : "vlocity_lwc20.PricingMatrixCalculationService", "remoteMethod" : "calculate", "remoteOptions" : { "actionContextCode" : "%ContextId%", "configurationName" : "PSSExpCloud_CalculateBenefitAmount", "explainabilitySpecName" : "BenefitApplicationLogs" }, "responseJSONNode" : "EligibleBenefitAmount", "responseJSONPath" : "output:calculationResults:NetBenefitAmount", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "input", "sendJSONPath" : "CalculateBenefitAmountInput", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: CalculateBenefitAmountForBenefitAssignmentLogs
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "GetParentIA:ParentApplicationId != NULL", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "ExpressionSetAction1", "remoteClass" : "vlocity_lwc20.PricingMatrixCalculationService", "remoteMethod" : "calculate", "remoteOptions" : { "actionContextCode" : "%FetchBenefitAssignmentsFromIA:BenefitAssignment:Id%", "configurationName" : "PSSExpCloud_CalculateBenefitAmount", "explainabilitySpecName" : "BenefitApplicationLogs" }, "responseJSONNode" : "EligibleBenefitAmount", "responseJSONPath" : "output:calculationResults:NetBenefitAmount", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "input", "sendJSONPath" : "CalculateBenefitAmountInput", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }
